questions.enonce: When reported speech starts with 'He said...', what usually happens to the present simple ?
'I am happy' becomes 'He said he was happy' in reported speech.
Complete: 'I will go tomorrow' -> He said he {{1}} go the next day.

pairs.right: Reported: He said he could help.
Reported: He said he had finished.
Reported: He told me to go away.
